title: NBA Finals Putback Rim POV Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals Putback Rim POV Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image premium vertical NBA Finals Game 4 poster from provided overhead backboard fisheye NBA Finals Game 4 source screenshot with real rim geometry and player spacing, preserving rim geometry and source-frame action spacing. Subject: OG Anunoby in a white New York Knicks number 8 uniform rising from under the rim for a compact second-jump putback tip-in stays recognizable as the main action: fingertips redirecting the loose ball above the cylinder while Spurs defenders in black and silver look up too late. Scene: Madison Square Garden packed Finals crowd, overhead backboard fisheye perspective, dark cinematic Knicks orange-and-blue energy, authentic Game 4 pressure, and playoff chaos below the rim. Composition: Vertical 4:5 poster composition that keeps the source-frame body spacing, rim geometry, backboard POV, ball-above-cylinder timing, and compact second-jump putback angle rather than turning the play into a generic dunk. Signature Elements: Preserved nba finals og putback rim pov poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium collectible NBA Finals editorial poster with realistic player likeness, polished sports-photo drama, cinematic color grading, fisheye rim POV intensity, and high-end social sports artwork finish. Color Palette: Knicks orange and blue highlights against dark arena shadows, Spurs black and silver accents below, white Knicks uniform, warm crowd glow, and bright rim/backboard highlights. Lighting: Hard arena rim light, overhead backboard glare, sharp ball and fingertip highlights, crowd falloff, and dramatic contrast around the rim cylinder. Typography: 29 POINT COMEBACK / 3-1 SERIES LEAD / ONE WIN AWAY / 1.2 SECONDS LEFT / 107-106 / THE PUTBACK / Never done, New York appears as the designed poster copy system with mini chart, score, series context, bottom headline, handwritten orange script, and small NBA Finals 2026 details. Restrictions: Keep OG Anunoby, Knicks, Spurs, and NBA Finals identity recognizable;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
